description:
The quiz assesses PostgreSQL proficiency by testing knowledge of built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and other nuanced features, presenting a moderate difficulty level with a friendly, encouraging tone. It aims to reinforce existing skills while introducing lesser‑known gotchas, making the experience both educational and enjoyable.
Topics: PostgreSQL aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, Advanced PostgreSQL features, Database gotchas
Audience: Developers and database practitioners with intermediate PostgreSQL experience who want to deepen their expertise.
